title: Water Seven Turns Hostile
description: While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.
scene: Across pages 24, this part follows Luffy, Paulie, Nico Robin, Nami, Zoro. While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: The criminals are somewhere on this island!!!

summary: While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.
